description_long: This fence consists of several short, pointed wooden stakes arranged in a crisscross pattern, forming a compact and sturdy barrier. The stakes are dark brown with sharpened tips, giving the fence a defensive, rustic appearance. The structure is reinforced by horizontal rails that connect the stakes, providing stability and cohesion. Two smaller, lighter-colored fence segments are visible, each with vertical pickets and horizontal rails, suggesting modularity or different design options. The wood texture is rough and unfinished, with visible grain and natural imperfections. This type of fence is commonly used for temporary barriers, construction sites, or decorative urban landscaping.
description: A compact, crisscrossed wooden fence with pointed stakes and rough, rustic texture, accompanied by two smaller picket-style segments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main crisscrossed fence with pointed stakes and horizontal rails, highlighting its defensive structure.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the intersecting stakes and two smaller picket fence segments, emphasizing the modular design.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the alignment of the stakes and rails, with the pointed tips clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view again shows the crisscrossed stakes and both smaller picket segments, providing a sense of depth and arrangement.
